reported_entities.name: Naturehike.nl (operated by Walthaus Outdoor, NL company, KvK 66288002)
reported_entities.claim: naturehike.de redirects to this Dutch-registered webshop, which markets itself as the European reseller of Naturehike and ships to Germany and Austria (and other EU countries); footer identifies the operating company as 'Walthaus outdoor', not Naturehike itself, so this reads as an independent/authorized reseller rather than a confirmed official regional distributor.

reported_entities.name: Naturehike Germany Store (eBay.de)
reported_entities.claim: An eBay.de shop branded 'Naturehike Germany Store' with high positive feedback and thousands of items sold, selling Naturehike products to German customers.

reported_entities.name: Amazon.de Naturehike storefront
reported_entities.claim: A branded Naturehike storefront exists on Amazon.de, indicating a marketplace seller presence in Germany, but it is unclear whether this is run by Naturehike directly or a third-party marketplace seller.

reported_entities.name: Arts-Outdoors.de
reported_entities.claim: German outdoor retailer carrying Naturehike camping/trekking products as one of several brands; no indication of exclusive distributor status.

reported_entities.name: naturehike-shop.com (German-language storefront)
reported_entities.claim: A reseller site advertising Naturehike outdoor gear 'at factory prices' with a German-language storefront; ownership/authorization relationship to Naturehike China is not stated on the page and was not independently verified.

reported_entities.name: Swiss online retailers carrying Naturehike (weshop.ch/reiseartikel-shop.ch, Camperreich.ch, trailrebel.ch, Outdoor Station (outdoorstation.ch), Galaxus.ch, Dachzelthimmel.ch, Overland Outfitters in Kemptthal)
reported_entities.claim: Multiple independent Swiss outdoor/camping e-commerce retailers list Naturehike as one of the brands they sell; these appear to be ordinary multi-brand retailers rather than a single designated Swiss distributor. Overland Outfitters has a physical retail location in Kemptthal, Switzerland.

reported_entities.name: Kaufland.at marketplace listings
reported_entities.claim: Naturehike products are listed for sale via third-party marketplace sellers on Kaufland.at (Austria), but this is a general marketplace, not a dedicated distributor.

notes: Public information on Naturehike's DACH distribution is thin and fragmented. No official Naturehike press release, partner-list page, or company statement was found naming a specific appointed distributor for Germany, Austria, or Switzerland. What surfaced instead is a scattered set of independent multi-brand online retailers and marketplace listings (eBay, Amazon, Kaufland) across all three countries, plus one Dutch-registered reseller (Walthaus Outdoor, trading as naturehike.nl) that naturehike.de redirects to and that ships into Germany and Austria — this is the closest candidate to a 'regional distributor' but its authorization status as an official Naturehike distributor was not confirmed on-page. Naturehike's own site has a generic '/de/pages/wholesale' page inviting wholesale inquiries, suggesting no fixed exclusive DACH distributor is publicly disclosed. Given the 5-query budget was used across 2 WebSearch + 3 WebFetch calls, this should be treated as a partial, not exhaustive, survey — confidence is low-to-moderate on all entries except the eBay/Amazon/marketplace presence, which is directly observable.
